---
title: "CLAUDE.md for Paper Reading"
description: "I use Claude to help me read a paper quickly in a limited amount of time."
# date: "2025-03-01"
toc: false
categories:
  - LLM-tools
---

I started using Claude to help me read papers more quickly, given that I couldn't spend too long time reading a paper when I have other works and a relatively slower pace of reading. You can see my CLAUDE.md file for this [here](https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fi/nbvuch1g8nvov0ucapy27/CLAUDE.md?rlkey=lhotjewjmnwrjei3p0f5hjlyz&dl=0).
